---
title: "bedq"
subtitle: "`bedq`"
description: "bedq"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/bedq/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                     | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|--------------------------|------------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                  | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `center`                 | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `bed_q_1`                | bed_q_1                      | string | Binge eating episode defined as eating a significantly larger amount of food than normal within a short time period, indicative of loss of control.                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `bed_q_2`                | bed_q_2                      | string | Loss of control over eating during binge episodes, including inability to stop or regulate intake.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `bed_q_3`                | bed_q_3                      | string | Rapid eating during binge episodes compared to usual eating pace.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `bed_q_4`                | bed_q_4                      | string | Eating to the point of uncomfortable fullness during binge episodes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `bed_q_5`                | bed_q_5                      | string | Eating large amounts of food without feeling physically hungry during binge eating episodes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `bed_q_6`                | bed_q_6                      | string | Eating alone during binge eating episodes due to embarrassment about the amount consumed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `bed_q_7`                | bed_q_7                      | string | Negative emotions after binge eating episodes, including feelings of disgust, depression, or guilt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `bed_q_8`                | bed_q_8                      | string | Vomiting following binge eating episodes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `bed_q_9`                | bed_q_9                      | string | Marked distress associated with binge eating behavior.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `bed_q_burden_score`     | bed_q_burden_score           | string | BED symptom burden score derived from binge eating questionnaire items. Derived using the formula: [bed_q_1] + [bed_q_2] + [bed_q_3] + [bed_q_4] + [bed_q_5] + [bed_q_6] + [bed_q_7]                                                                                                                                                 |
| `bed_q_diagnostic_score` | bed_q_diagnostic_score       | string | BED diagnostic score indicating presence of binge eating disorder based on questionnaire criteria. Derived using the formula: if( [bed_q_1] >= 2 and [bed_q_2] >= 2 and ( ([bed_q_3] >= 2) + ([bed_q_4] >= 2) + ([bed_q_5] >= 2) + ([bed_q_6] >= 2) + ([bed_q_7] >= 2) ) >= 3 and [bed_q_8] <= 1 and [bed_q_9] = 1, 1,0) |

: Fields in the `bedq` resource.
